scores.rule_polity_reasoning: The text describes the customs and legendary origins of the Temple of Atargatis in Hieropolis (Bambyce), Syria.
scores.rule_time_reasoning: Lucian of Samosata wrote 'De Dea Syria' around 160 CE, documenting contemporary and local religious customs.
